clarity.notes: Step 13 is a manual final polish pass. It fixes the visible cockpit/title pressure, restores Election countdown prominence, gives MAP a proper control footprint, and separates the open-map reset action from the title cluster.

hierarchy.notes: The clock remains the central instrument through the SVG gauge itself rather than a separate box. Election countdown values are readable again, MAP reads as an intentional control, and the open map header now has a clearer title/actions split.

typography.notes: Step 9 and Step 10 typography decisions are retained. Active and elections-open/election round badges remain text-only labels with existing color treatment.

motion.notes: No motion or interaction behavior changed. MAP controls, reset behavior, MapLibre interactions, countdown timers, Network message fades, copy feedback, hover states, and focus-visible states remain driven by existing code.

brand.notes: The premium dark sportcar dashboard direction remains intact: carbon cockpit shell, exposed gauge, stronger instrument numerals, deliberate MAP control, and restrained blue/green/gold/cyan semantic accents.
